name: Italian Balsamic Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large zip-top bag, combine the first six ingredients.
2. Add the chicken to the bag and seal it.
3. Refrigerate at least 2 hours to allow for marination.
4. Remove the chicken from the bag and discard the marinade.
5. Grill the chicken for 6 minutes on each side or until cooked through.
6. Cool the chicken before cutting into 1/4-inch strips.
Serving Ideas:
Serve in flour tortillas with grilled vegetables, Tuscan White Beans, Antipasto Salsa, Fresh Mango Salsa, or Cucumber Raita Sauce. Great on salads too.
